name: IMAP Email
description: Generic IMAP connector for reading and searching emails in playbooks. Works with Gmail, Outlook, Microsoft 365, Exchange, and any IMAP server. Use to monitor inboxes, fetch phishing reports, and process inbound alerts.
setup_doc:
IMAP EMAIL — SETUP GUIDE
========================

CREDENTIALS NEEDED
  Username   Your email address (e.g., alerts@yourcompany.com)
  Password   Your account password or app-specific password

BASE URL FORMAT
  imaps://host:port   SSL/TLS on port 993  (recommended)
  imap://host:port    Plain/STARTTLS on port 143

COMMON IMAP SERVERS
  Gmail           imaps://imap.gmail.com:993
  Outlook / M365  imaps://outlook.office365.com:993
  Yahoo Mail      imaps://imap.mail.yahoo.com:993
  Exchange        imaps://mail.yourcompany.com:993

GMAIL SETUP
  1. Enable IMAP in Gmail Settings > Forwarding and POP/IMAP
  2. Enable 2-Step Verification on your Google Account
  3. Go to Google Account > Security > App Passwords
  4. Select app: Mail / device: Other
  5. Use your Gmail address as username
  6. Use the generated app password (not your login password)

  NOTE: Standard accounts may also need to enable
  'Less secure app access' in older Google Workspace configs.

OUTLOOK / MICROSOFT 365
  1. IMAP must be enabled by your Exchange/M365 admin
  2. Go to Outlook Settings > Mail > Sync Email to verify
  3. If MFA is enabled, generate an App Password in
     Microsoft Account Security settings

EXCHANGE ON-PREMISES
  1. Ask your Exchange admin to enable IMAP for your mailbox
  2. Use your full email address or domain\username as username
  3. Port 993 for SSL, port 143 for STARTTLS

TROUBLESHOOTING
  - 'Authentication failed': Check that IMAP is enabled for your
    account and you are using an App Password if MFA is on.
  - 'Connection refused': Verify host and port. Check firewall rules.
  - Gmail blocking: Enable 'Allow less secure apps' OR use OAuth2.

actions.name: Search Inbox
actions.description: Search for emails matching criteria (subject, sender, date range)

parameters.name: since_date
parameters.description: Only emails received after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 10)

actions.name: Get Email
actions.description: Fetch the full content of a specific email by UID

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Email UID from a search result

actions.name: Mark Email as Read
actions.description: Mark one or more emails as read by UID

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: Email UID or comma-separated list of UIDs

actions.name: Move Email
actions.description: Move an email to a different folder
